Chapter 1: The Awakening.title: Chapter 1: The Awakening
Chapter 1: The Awakening.text:
In the beginning, there was silence. Then came the voice. A voice that could shatter dimensions and
bend time itself. The demon stirred beneath the ancient seal, waiting for the right moment to break
free.

Chapter 2: The Ritual.title: Chapter 2: The Ritual
Chapter 2: The Ritual.text:
Rick grabbed the portal gun and adjusted the dial. Morty stood behind him, trembling. We need
exactly three ounces of dark matter, Rick said. Morty replied: Why do I always have to carry the
unstable stuff? Because you are the unstable stuff, Rick grinned.
